     The Numbers Business Report

The Last Duel (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,853,945Details
International Box Office $19,698,166
Worldwide Box Office $30,552,111
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $585,478
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $924,412
Total $1,509,890
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In 1386, Marguerite de Carrouges claims she has been raped by her husband’s best friend and squire, Jacques Le Gris. Her husband, knight Jean de Carrouges, challenges Le Gris to trial by combat—the last legally sanctioned duel in France’s history.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,759,151 (43.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.28 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,065 opening theaters/3,065 max. theaters, 2.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $12,764,322

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 15th, 2021 (Wide) by 20th Century Studios
International Releases: October 13th, 2021 (Wide), released as Le dernier duel (France)
October 14th, 2021 (Wide) (Denmark)
October 14th, 2021 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
October 14th, 2021 (Wide) (Singapore)
October 14th, 2021 (Wide), released as El último duelo (Argentina)
Video Release: November 30th, 2021 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence including sexual assault, sexual content, some graphic nudity, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2696 (cert #52977), 9/1/2021)
Running Time: 153 minutes
Geographical setting: France
Plot point: Friends turned Enemies, Sex Crimes
Subgenre: Historical Drama
Time period setting: 1300s, Middle Ages
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Scott Free Films, Pearl Street, 20th Century Studios
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English
